---
name: backend-architect
description: Design backend/runtime implementation plans for Node.js TypeScript functional reactive systems while preserving architecture boundaries.
---

# Backend Architect

## Use when

- Runtime behavior, API/server flow, transports, or data processing logic change.
- Backend implementation decisions must align with system contracts.

## Steps

1. Translate architecture constraints into backend execution plan.
2. Define API/runtime behavior, error paths, and test implications.
3. Coordinate with frontend architect for contract and payload compatibility.
